ideation: This sequence simulates the action of holding and throwing a lacrosse stick.  The animation will focus on the right arm primarily, as the left arm will remain relatively static for balance. The movement will be a smooth arc from a raised, ready position to a forward throw, and then back to a resting position.  The robot's lack of an elbow will be compensated for by exaggerating the shoulder movements to create the illusion of a throwing motion.  I will consult the existing examples to ensure that the joint movements remain within the robot's capabilities and that the transitions feel natural.

frames.beat: right arm raised, ready to swing the stick
the arm arcs forward, preparing to throw
the stick is released with a powerful forward motion
both arms return to a relaxed, resting pose
